Free Text:
Temporary TVCB concrete barriers have been installed along the Down cess, with proprietary fence panels fixed to the top. The TVCBs measure 450 mm wide, 800 mm high, and 3 m long, with a weight of 2,500 kg.
They are positioned in the Down cess at a minimum distance of 1.7 m from the nearest running rail.

The line speed is 125 mph. While the minimum clearance achieved is 1,700 mm—greater than the 1,370 mm requirement for the temporary works gauge—it remains below the 2,480 mm requirement of the standard gauge.

The NR Gauging Engineer has requested that limited clearance signs be installed at both ends of the catch fence and that a temporary update be made to the sectional appendix. This is required because the standard gauge allows for safe walking access to the structure.
